name: agentstate-lite-monorepo
description: Monorepo for agentstate-lite — a minimal, filesystem-first OKF knowledge store. The publishable artifact is the `agentstate-lite` CLI (packages/cli), which bundles core + the reference server + UI assets.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @agentstate-lite/core -w @agentstate-lite/server -w @agentstate-lite/worker && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:scripts && npm run check:skill -w agentstate-lite && npm run e2e:gate -w @agentstate-lite/ui
scripts.check:plugin-bundle: npm run check:skill:bundle -w agentstate-lite && npm run check:bundle -w agentstate-lite
